title: Icy Juicy Korean Kalguksu Noodles
description: Nutty, juicy, and soothing Korean noodle soup featuring hispi sweetheart cabbage and fermented kimchi.
instructions: Combine 4 cups of water and Korean Chili Flakes in a large pot, and bring to a boil
Reduce heat to medium-low and add Gochujang, Korean Chili Paste, and 2 cups of water to the pot, stirring to combine
Meanwhile, prepare the corn husk wraps by cutting 4 large husks into quarters and soaking in water for 10 minutes
Remove the husks from the water and place them on a baking sheet, and set aside
